verdict: Good sync and rhythmic density, but severely held back by forced 360-degree spins and awkward stream flow unsuitable for a Medium chart.

issues.problem: Forcibly loops a 360-degree spin pattern (L-U-D-R) on consecutive 8th notes, which is highly disorienting and overly technical for a Medium difficulty.
The stream pattern (L -> U -> D -> R -> U -> D -> L) breaks natural alternation, forcing awkward double-steps or abrupt body rotations.
